title: LEAKED Document Holds Keys to UFO Secret Holders
summary: This interview segment discusses the Wilson memo, a leaked document describing a meeting between Admiral Thomas Wilson and physicist Eric Davis about a private aerospace corporation allegedly reverse engineering crashed UFOs outside government oversight.

key_claims.claim: The Wilson memo describes a secret meeting between Admiral Thomas Wilson and Eric Davis
A black budget private aerospace corporation is attempting to reverse engineer crashed UFOs without official government oversight
The gatekeepers of the reverse engineering program believe the material in their possession is not of this Earth
The reverse engineering process has had little to no success since Roswell
The program operates under intense compartmentalization where only those at the top have the full picture
